warn.noAdapter: No loot adapter registered for system "{system}". This system may not be supported.
warn.noAdapterDescription: No loot adapter is registered for this game system. The module currently supports D&D 5e and Pathfinder 2e. See the API documentation to add support for other systems.
warn.noItemsSelected: No items were assigned to the lottery or stash. Please assign at least one item.

error.generateFailed: Loot generation failed. Check the console for details.

compendiumSources.name: Compendium Sources
compendiumSources.label: Configure
compendiumSources.hint: Choose which Item compendiums are searched by the Quest and Shop generators.
compendiumSources.title: Compendium Sources
compendiumSources.bodyHint: Check the compendiums you want the Quest and Shop generators to search. Default packs are pre-selected based on your game system.

partyStashConfig.name: Party Stash Actor
partyStashConfig.label: Configure
partyStashConfig.hint: Set the actor that receives stash items and shared currency.

partyStashActor.name: Party Stash Actor (UUID)
partyStashActor.hint: UUID of the actor that receives stash items and shared currency. Use the Configure button above to set this via drag-and-drop.

includeMagicItems.name: Include Magic Items
includeMagicItems.hint: Include magic items in generated loot. When disabled, only coins, gems, and art objects will be rolled.

includeGems.name: Include Gems
includeGems.hint: Include gem rewards in hoard loot (2014 DMG). Has no effect on 2024 DMG tables.

includeArtObjects.name: Include Art Objects
includeArtObjects.hint: Include art object rewards in hoard loot (2014 DMG). Has no effect on 2024 DMG tables.

allowDuplicateItems.name: Allow Duplicate Items
allowDuplicateItems.hint: When disabled (default), each item name can only appear once per loot roll. Recommended off to avoid receiving 10 Potions of Healing.

currencyDistribution.name: Default Currency Distribution
currencyDistribution.hint: How currency is distributed by default. Can be overridden per session in Lottery Setup.

lotteryTimeout.name: Player Roll Timeout (seconds)
lotteryTimeout.hint: Seconds players have to roll or pass before the GM can force-resolve the item. Set to 0 to disable the timer.

tableEdition.name: D&D 5e Table Edition
tableEdition.hint: Which edition of the DMG treasure tables to use by default. Can be overridden per roll in the generation dialog.

includeUncommon.name: PF2e: Include Uncommon Items
includeUncommon.hint: Allow uncommon items to appear in generated loot.

includeRare.name: PF2e: Include Rare Items
includeRare.hint: Allow rare items to appear in generated loot.

field.creatureCountHint: How many individual creatures' loot to roll. Each rolls separately on the individual table.
field.tableEditionHint: Override the global table edition for this roll only.

field.partySizeHint: Number of players (base 4). Adjusts treasure budget per the GM Core table.
field.customBudgetHint: Total gold piece budget to allocate.

lottery.dropActorHere: Drag an actor here to set as party stash
lottery.noStashWarning: No party stash configured. Configure one in Module Settings.
lottery.itemNotInCompendium: (not found in compendium — will be listed as text)

chat.itemPassed: All players passed on {item} — sent to stash.

notify.youWon: You won {item}! It has been added to your character sheet.

treasure.title: Treasure Hoard
treasure.desc: Roll random loot from DMG or system tables.

quest.title: Quest Rewards
quest.desc: Hand-pick items one at a time for a quest reward.

shop.title: Shop Inventory
shop.desc: Generate a bulk inventory for a merchant or shop.

lists.title: Saved Lists
lists.desc: Browse and award previously saved loot lists.

quest.title: Quest Reward Builder
quest.rollPrompt: Configure filters above, then roll for your first item.
quest.noResults: No items found matching your filters. Try adjusting the rarity or types.
quest.noItems: No items in the reward list yet.
quest.dragDropHint: Drag items from the Compendium here, or roll above

shop.title: Shop Inventory Generator
shop.createFailed: Failed to create shop actor. Check the console for details.

savedLists.title: Saved Loot Lists
savedLists.emptyHint: Save a loot list from the Quest or Shop generators, or from Lottery Setup.
savedLists.deleteConfirmBody: Delete the list {name}? This cannot be undone.
